summary: Frontend-only test of (A) /ratings blank-page fix and (B) Walk-in Booking modal 7 refinements. Ratings was LIVE-tested as customer@test.com — page renders correctly (NOT blank): 'My Ratings & Reviews' header + 3 stat cards + awaiting-rating-section + 4 pending-rating-{order_id} cards (1 Scream-7 cinema + 3 Bus Yaounde->Bafoussam) + 4 rate-now-btn-{order_id} buttons. Modal opens with 5 rating-star-{n} + rating-review-input + Submit Review button. PIcon JSX fix (Ratings.jsx L266/L279) is correct. WalkInBookingModal source-verified (admin live nav blocked by HTTP 429). All 7 refinements + required data-testids present: cinema cascade /cinema/{id}/showtimes with walkin-cinema-showtime-{st.id} -> CinemaSeatMap; hotel walkin-hotel-room-{id} with 80px thumb + auto-total nights*price; travel LiveSeatMap wrapped in 'max-w-md mx-auto scale-90'; restaurant walkin-rest-{plus,minus,qty}-{id} 64px thumb + auto-total; laundry walkin-laundry-mode-{pickup|delivery} with conditional delivery_address/city/phone; package MapPin Origin->Destination prefill + walkin-pkg-tier-{idx} + receiver{,-phone,-address,-city,-postal}. ALL service blocks use 'border-l-2 border-slate-200 pl-4' (zero bg-{color}-50 card wrappers). admin/Bookings.jsx uses /cinema/?limit=100 + respKey 'cinemas'.

integration_issues.issue: admin@test.com dashboard XHRs return HTTP 429 immediately after login; modal verified by source

action_items: Investigate 429 rate-limit on admin@test.com dashboard load.
Optional: data-testid='rating-error-toast' on empty-review toast for automated assertions.
critical_code_review_comments: Bookings.jsx services dropdown capped at limit=100 — silently truncates for large operators.
Confirm /operator/manual-bookings/ works without trailing-slash 307 dropping Authorization.
test_credentials: customer@test.com / testpassword123 (live ok); admin@test.com / testpassword123 (429 after login).
context_for_next_testing_agent: For live Walk-in modal validation use operator creds (operator@test.com, mani-monroe@netflix.com) to bypass admin 429. All required data-testids exist in source.
rca of the issue: (A) Ratings blank caused by lucide forwardRef object used as React child; fixed via PIcon = SERVICE_ICONS[..]||Package + <PIcon/>. (B) Walk-in cinema cascade: admin/Bookings.jsx now fetches /cinema/?limit=100 (was /cinema/films) and backend /cinema/{id}/showtimes returns 'id' so walkin-cinema-showtime-{st.id} keys are stable; CinemaSeatMap loaded via /cinema/showtimes/{id}/details.
